title: Foil Balloon Weights for Helium Balloons in Rose Gold Foil - 12x 160g Heavy Balloon Weights Birthday Party Wedding Celebration Décor with Tassles
features: A Pack of 12 Rose Gold Foil Weights with a pretty fringed finish.
Easily secure helium balloons to a balloon Weights or Weighted centrepiece to stop your bouquet from floating away.
Simply secure the balloons using balloon or curling ribbon. (Sold separately).
Each weight weighs approx 160g and can hold up to approx 10 x latex or 12 x foil balloons - this can vary and is only a guide.

These Weights are a perfect accessory to your balloons, theme and event. Perfect for Baby Showers, Hen Parties, Christmas, Halloween, Birthday Parties, Valentine's Day, Anniversaries, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Memorials and any special events.
